title: Q1 2024 Revenue Report - Client Acme Corp
content: Acme Corp contributed $125,000 in Q1 revenue across 3 product categories. Their spend increased 15% quarter-over-quarter.

title: Top Customers Analysis - Including Client Acme Corp
content: Analysis of top 20 customers by spend. Acme Corp ranked #3 with consistent monthly ordering patterns.

title: Product Category Performance H1 2024
content: Electronics led with 42% of total revenue, followed by Fashion at 28%. Growth was strongest in Home & Garden (+22% YoY).

title: Regional Sales Comparison Q2 2024
content: US region led all markets with $2.1M in Q2 sales. EMEA showed strongest growth at 18% QoQ. APAC remained stable.
